title: The Sky Hangar
lines: At the very edge of the orange sands, a cyclopean structure of rusted, non-Euclidean steel looms out of the dunes. It is an ancient hangar, its great doors long since torn away by winds that sound like distant screaming.
Inside, the floor is buried under centuries of fine, grey silt, but in the center, something impossible remains: a luminous, crystalline helix spiraling into the bruised-purple firmament.
The stairs hum with a faint, low-frequency vibration that resonates within your very marrow, whispering secrets you cannot quite understand.

options.desc: 2. Search the rusted scaffolding for supplies
3. Retreat back into the open desert
